/usr/bin/c++ -Wno-psabi  -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/radar.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radar.dir/hisnr_usrp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radar.dir/usrp_rf_settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radar.dir/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radar.dir/pseudorandom_phase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radar.dir/chirp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radar.dir/sdr.cpp.o -o radar  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libuhd.dylib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libboost_program_options.dylib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libboost_filesystem.dylib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libboost_system.dylib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libyaml-cpp.0.6.3.dylib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libpython3.11.dylib /opt/anaconda3/envs/uhd/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib
